changelog:
v1.6.3 - Stable Models Only + Safety Fix

- Removed DeepSeek V4 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra, GLM-5 — timed out / unavailable on NVIDIA API
- Reverted safety model to working nemotron-content-safety-reasoning-4b with relaxed prompt
- Vision engine now uses NvidiaKeyManager with both keys for auto-retry on 429
- Programmer default model changed to Llama 3.3 70B
- Working models: Nemotron 3 Super, Nemotron Super 49B, Llama 3.3 70B, Llama 3.2 Vision, Llama 3.1 8B, Nemotron 3 Nano, Kimi K2/K2.6
